scripts.dev: CODEX_CLI_PATH="$(zsh -lc 'command -v codex 2>/dev/null || true')" concurrently -k "vite --host 127.0.0.1" "wait-on tcp:5173 && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && electron ."
scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && node scripts/copy-electron-prompts.mjs && vite build
